◎简　　介  

　　As always, fun, excitement and gossip permeate the rarified air of Beverly Hills. Lisa Vanderpump has been tapped to throw out a first pitch at Dodger Stadium, while Kyle buys $75,000 sunglasses for her store. Unfortunately, real life always has a way of rearing its ugly head.
